group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]Mami Tomoe.
[fontSize:20]If I may, I'd like to ask you again.
[fontSize:20]Have you been hiding something from me?
[fontSize:20]A month ago, you handed this town@over to Homura Akemi.
[fontSize:20]Ceding territory like that is very risky.
[fontSize:20]From where I stand, it doesn't seem@like a particularly rational decision.

group_1.textAvLeft: [fontSize:20]You know how powerful@Miss Akemi is, right?
[fontSize:20]I value my life as much as the next girl.

group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]Yes...@Homura's powers are still a mystery.
[fontSize:20]She manages to ambush every Witch@that shows up, without fail.
[fontSize:20]It's almost as if she has foreknowledge@of what is to come.

group_1.textAvLeft: [fontSize:20]...Are you saying she uses magic@to predict the future?

group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]Either that...or she is manipulating time@to repeat the same period over and over.

group_1.textAvLeft: [fontSize:20]I see...@I've seen her teleport at times...
[fontSize:20]But she could have just been moving@while time was frozen...

group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]It seems to me that Homura is trying to@stop Madoka Kaname from contracting.
[fontSize:20]The source of Madoka's enormous@hidden potential...
[fontSize:20]...may stem from the causal chain@created by repeated time loops.

group_1.textAvLeft: [fontSize:20]...But that's all just a theory, right?
[fontSize:20]There's no way to verify it without@sharing the same timeline.

group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]Indeed, that is true.
[fontSize:20]This theory of mine would be lost@as soon as time resets, after all.
[fontSize:20]But anticipating what I should entrust to@her amidst these discontinuous timelines...
[fontSize:20]I think that would be very worthwhile.
[fontSize:20]You're a Magical Girl, too, so just imagine.
[fontSize:20]Say you had the power to control time...
[fontSize:20]...but it meant that every friendship,@memory, or feeling you had was erased@as if it never happened.
[fontSize:20]How long could you keep your grip@on sanity?

group_1.textAvLeft: [fontSize:20]It's like one of those time loop movies.
[fontSize:20]A friend of mine who's really into films@used to say...
[fontSize:20]...that's the kind of loneliness@that can't be endured alone.

group_1.textAvRight: [fontSize:20]So for humans to stay sane...
[fontSize:20]...they need a way to fend off loneliness.
